title.en: These Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintle...

content.en:
These Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land were all shocked.

If you are in the realm of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, you control the time, then the talent is too demonic.

Basically, these Legendary Realm Lords were all after becoming half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and then after endless years of penance, they mastered time or space.

It's like Lord Baiheng, whose combat power is invincible, but it also took an unimaginable amount of time to control time.

Now, he was really stimulated to hear that someone might have controlled time in the Transcendental Legendary Lord realm

Of course, there is no jealousy, after all, he has broken through to the realm of the Legendary Realm Lord, if he still hears this sentence when he is still a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, I am afraid that he will really be jealous.

"No, it's not a transcendent realm lord either!"

The Frostless Lord said again.

"It's not a half-step Legendary Realm, and it's not a Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord. Lord Longgu suddenly thought: "Could it be that after controlling the space, the Lord of the Legendary Realm has also controlled the time, could it be that we are really going to give birth to a Peak Legendary Realm Lord in the Holy Land?"

When he thought of this, he was very excited.

Who is it?

Everyone looked at each other, obviously not these Legendary Realm Lords present.

However, there are still Legendary Realm Lords who have not come, could it be one of those Legendary Realm Lords?

"Of course it's not the Legendary Realm Lord, even if there is really a Legendary Realm Lord who controls time or space, it is you who will know first, not me, the new Legendary Realm Lord. "

Frost-free lord said.

"That's right!"

Several Legendary Realm Lords felt that what the Frostless Lord said made sense.

"Lord Frostless, don't hide it, what the hell is going on, let's talk about it. Lord Wasteland couldn't help but say.

Airplanes!!!!

The surrounding time and space are frozen, which is to prevent any Legendary Realm Lord from snooping on this place.

Of course, this can't stop the prying eyes of the Eternal Master, but the Eternal Master won't be so boring.

"It's a half-step transcendent Legendary Lord who controls time. "Lord Frost Freedom said.

"What, the Half-Step Transcendental Legendary Lord has controlled time?"

The Dragon Gu Lord couldn't believe it, thinking that the Frostless Lord was joking?

"You should be able to guess who it is."

The Frostless Lord said again.

The Dragon Gu Lord thought about it, and thought of one, and the other Legendary Realm Lords also thought of it.

Because in the True Absence Holy Land of Rutai, there is only one outstanding half-step transcendent realm legendary lord.

"Lord of the Clouds!"

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

"Yes," said Lord Frostless.

"The Endless Lord has controlled time, how is this possible, how long has he only been cultivating?" Lord Longgu was shocked: "I remember that he didn't join us for a long time, all the way from the Origin Realm Lord to the Perfection Realm, the Realm Realm, and now the Half-Step Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord, if it weren't for the Gray Mist Stone Statue, I wouldn't know him as a Legendary Lord."

Lord Frostless said, "I know it's hard to believe, but he does control time. You should know how much of a sensation it would be for a half-step Transcendental Legendary Lord to take control of time. That's why I propose to give to the Endless Lord the Eternal Arcana of the True Void Land that can be hidden and changed in cultivation. "

"If that's the case, give it to him!"

"I agree!"

"Agreed!"

These Legendary Realm Lords said one by one.

"Everyone agrees, the eternal treasure is confirmed!" said the Frostless Lord.

At this time, Lord Longgu said: "The Endless Lord has controlled time, and it is very difficult to completely conceal it, unless he never makes a move, and he has been practicing in retreat. But a Legendary Lord can't stay out of action all the time, and we can't restrain the Endless Lord. He, eventually, will still be exposed. "

"As long as the Endless Lord's body is in the True Void Holy Land, there is no need to worry too much about his safety. "

Frost-free lord said.

"With the qualifications of the Endless Lord, it is not difficult for him to condense the Legendary Body, why hasn't he broken through yet?" asked the Baiheng Lord.

"He is here to condense the Supreme Legend. @无霜领主解释道.

"Supreme Legend, how is this possible?"

Lord Longgu shook his head.

Lord Frostless said, "The Endless Lord has already obtained the Time River Pearl, and if our chance goes well this time, he may also have a chance to obtain the Kuhai Gravel, and then only the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space will be missing." "

"The Endless Lord has already collected the Time River Beads? "Lord Baiheng said.

At this time, Lord Longgu revealed a piece of news.

"Time and Space Ancient Leaves, I do know a little bit of news. "

Dragon Ancient Lord Dao.

"What, Dragon Ancient Lord, do you know the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space?" the Frostless Lord was surprised.

"By chance, I learned a piece of news, and I'm not sure if it's true or not. Lord Longgu said, "The news I got is that the white-bearded old man has a space-time ancient leaf in his hand. "

White-bearded old man!

Many Legendary Realm Lords have heard of it, this is a peak Legendary Realm Lord, extremely ancient, rumored to be older than the Xing Eternal Realm Master, and even had a tea discussion with more than one Eternal Controller.

..... 0，

However, the old man with white beard has no power, he is alone, and he has no relatives, but in an ancient war, the old man with white beard disappeared and was affected and destroyed.

"Old man with white beard, this Legendary Realm Lord has no desires, it is too difficult to obtain the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space from him, and we have no friendship with each other!" said the Lord of the Wasted River.

"This is the matter of the Endless Lord, we will reveal this news to him, whether he can obtain the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space is up to him. "

Lord Longgu smiled.

That's right, too.

It would be good for them to reveal this news, and it was impossible for them to really seek the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space for him at all costs

Subsequently, the Frostless Lord went to the treasure house of the True Immortal Land to retrieve the Eternal Treasure, the Hundred Illusion Beads!

Soon, the Hundred Illusion Beads were taken out.

So, the Frostless Lord came to Ye Tian for the first time.

"I've seen Lord Frostless. "

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Endless Lord, this is the Eternal Supreme Treasure Hundred Illusion Bead, which can change your cultivation aura, and even the Legendary Realm Lord will not be able to gain insight into your cultivation realm. Moreover, your strength itself is very strong, and others will only think that you are the top Transcendental Legendary Lord. Lord Frostless said.

"Thank you, Lord Frostless!"

Ye Tian took the Hundred Illusion Bead and thanked Jiu Hundred Million.
